purpose: Bind the Collatz terminal cycle 4->2->1 to the spin-half projection endpoint 1/2 and place the zeta layer as an imaginary zero axis over the same half-anchor.

collatz_terminal_axis.note: 1/2 is not an integer Collatz iterate; it is the spin-half / projective endpoint tying terminal Collatz to Euler closure.

zeta_imaginary_zero_axis.role: coherence axis, not raw mass damping cost

validation_gates: No observed fermion masses used as inputs.
All minimal twin-prime branches are required to lock to the terminal half endpoint.
Zeta anchors must remain on the critical-line half anchor.
No nested archives are allowed in the merged repository.
